topic: My dishwasher only finishes its cycle when I am asleep and stops if I stay up to watch
title: My Dishwasher Only Finishes Its Cycle When I Am Asleep. It Stops If I Watch. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My dishwasher only finishes its cycle when I am asleep. It stops if I watch.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a stainless steel dishwasher front panel with a cycle indicator light glowing, dim kitchen ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Whirlpool. Bought new last year. Standard ninety minute cycle.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small kitchen with a dishwasher built into the lower cabinets, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I run it after dinner. Once a day.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand pressing the start button on a dishwasher control panel, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First noticed in March. Started it at nine. Awake at midnight. Still running.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dishwasher cycle progress display showing a partially complete cycle past midnight, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Turned off the kitchen light. Went to bed.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a darkened kitchen with the dishwasher front panel illuminated by its indicator light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Cycle finished by morning. Dishes clean.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open dishwasher with clean plates and glasses arranged in the racks, soft morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Stayed up the next night to watch it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person seated on a kitchen stool facing the dishwasher seen from behind, no face visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Started at nine. By eleven the cycle had not advanced.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a dishwasher control panel showing a stalled cycle progress indicator, dim kitchen ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Hired a technician. He stood in front of it. The dishwasher would not finish.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an appliance technician in uniform seen from behind kneeling beside a dishwasher, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He left at midnight. The cycle ended six minutes after the door closed behind him.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dishwasher control panel showing a completed cycle indicator at twelve oh six AM, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide interior of a small dark kitchen viewed from a hallway doorway, the dishwasher indicator light glowing softly, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yesterday I set up a camera. The dishes were clean. The drum was empty in the footage.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of security camera footage paused on a screen showing an open dishwasher with empty racks, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
